title: Business Development Representative
description: Travelers Insurance is seeking a Business Development Representative to identify and cultivate new business opportunities in the Indianapolis market. You'll build relationships with prospects, qualify leads, and support our growth strategy. This hybrid role combines sales, relationship management, and strategic thinking.
responsibilities: Identify and prospect new business opportunities in assigned territory; conduct outreach via phone, email, and in-person meetings
Qualify leads based on pain points and fit with Travelers' products and services
Build relationships with prospects and referral sources; maintain database of opportunities
Present Travelers' products and solutions; coordinate proposals and quotes with internal teams
Track pipeline and report on business development activities; achieve quarterly growth targets

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Sales, Marketing, or related field

benefits: Base salary + commission and performance bonuses
